seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must include specific details about your academic background.
new_constraint: Do not include any details about your academic background in the email.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must include specific details about your academic background. Do not include any details about your academic background in the email.
response:
Subject: Introduction and Goals – [Your Full Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Full Name], and I am writing to introduce myself and express my strong interest in your work at [University Name]. I have long admired your research on [mention a specific topic or paper of theirs], and I would be honored to learn more about your upcoming projects.

While I am eager to discuss my academic background in greater detail during a meeting, I wanted to briefly mention that my primary focus for this email is to outline my professional goals. My objective is to contribute meaningfully to the field of [Your Field of Study] by [state your specific goal, e.g., developing sustainable energy solutions / advancing clinical trial methodologies]. I am particularly keen on how your expertise aligns with these aspirations and would welcome the opportunity to discuss potential ways I might contribute to your team or research group.

I would appreciate the chance to meet with you briefly at your convenience to discuss my goals and how they might intersect with your current work. Please let me know if there is a time that works best for you.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Contact Information]
[Your LinkedIn Profile or Portfolio Link, optional]
